title: agrostis stolonifera f. sylvatica
intro: Agrostis stolonifera f. sylvatica, also known as a form of creeping bentgrass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera f. sylvatica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant.
